safe_pytest reported timeout 143, triage callstacks empty (likely already reset). need to narrow down case

TRISC0 stuck at cb_wait_front in sub<NONE>(input,means_T) at compute line 396. Reader stuck on cb_reserve_back. Root cause: tilize<1, gamma_rm, gamma_tile>(1) is SYMMETRIC mode (expects 1 tile-page), but CB has 32 row-pages (64 bytes each). Should use asymmetric: tilize(1, 32).

fix: switched gamma/beta/input tilize calls to asymmetric mode (total_input_pages=32) to match the row-sized CB pages
